/opt/homebrew/Cellar/emscripten/4.0.16/libexec/em++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -sWASM=1 -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sINITIAL_MEMORY=67108864 -sMAXIMUM_MEMORY=268435456 -sSTACK_SIZE=1048576 -sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=[_surge_ui_init,_surge_ui_init_scaled,_surge_ui_tick,_surge_ui_get_fb,_surge_ui_get_width,_surge_ui_get_height,_surge_ui_on_mouse_down,_surge_ui_on_mouse_up,_surge_ui_on_mouse_move,_surge_ui_on_mouse_wheel,_surge_ui_set_param,_surge_ui_get_param,_surge_ui_get_param_count,_surge_ui_get_program,_surge_ui_set_program,_surge_ui_get_program_count,_surge_ui_get_program_name,_surge_ui_shutdown,_malloc,_free] -sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=[ccall,cwrap,getValue,setValue,UTF8ToString] -sMODULARIZE=1 -sEXPORT_NAME=createSurgeUI -sENVIRONMENT=web -sNO_EXIT_RUNTIME=1 -sASSERTIONS=0 -sNO_FILESYSTEM=0 -sUSE_FREETYPE=1 --no-entry -O2 -flto @CMakeFiles/SurgeUI.dir/objects1.rsp -o /Users/spot/Code/DEViLBOX/public/surge/SurgeUI.js @CMakeFiles/SurgeUI.dir/linkLibs.rsp
